Among the ground-truth purchase options, this most closely matches the 'Family House' option (CAD $650K, rating 10) since it is a family-oriented detached home with a double garage in a top school district. The financing solution described (using home equity, down payment, and a fixed-rate mortgage) corresponds to the 'Traditional Mortgage' option (rating 9). The moving services total (CAD $3,800) indicates a professional mover package, aligning best with 'Standard Moving' (rating 8) as it is not low-cost self-move nor the premium white-glove service.
